UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's public profile and settings.

profileImageUrl.description: URL for the user's profile picture.

rating.description: The user's average rating, if applicable.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the profile was created.

SellerProfile.title: Seller Profile
SellerProfile.description: Represents a seller's profile on the AgroConnect Market.

id.description: The seller's unique ID (same as user ID).

name.description: The business name of the seller.

products.description: A list of products the seller offers.

priceRange.description: A string representing the price range, e.g., '₦1000 - ₦5000'.

imageId.description: The ID for the placeholder image.

Report.title: Report
Report.description: Represents a report submitted by a user regarding an issue (e.g., power outage, flood).

userId.description: ID of the user who submitted the report.

category.description: Category of the report (e.g., power, flood, waste).

location.description: Location description of the reported issue.

status.description: Status of the report (e.g., pending, in progress, resolved).

upvotes.description: Number of upvotes the report has received.

commentsCount.description: Number of comments on the report.

time.description: Timestamp of when the report was created.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a financial transaction in a user's wallet.

/sellers/{userId}.description: Stores seller profiles for the marketplace.

/reports/{reportId}/comments/{commentId}.description: Stores comments for a specific report.
